message:
feat(cli): Add unified color module with semantic palette and TTY detection

- Add src/cli/colors.rs with:
  - ColorSupport enum for detecting terminal color capabilities
  - MsColors struct with semantic colors (layers, status, scores, diffs, priorities)
  - MsStyles struct with pre-built style functions (success, error, warning, etc.)
  - styled() and with_color() helpers for conditional color application
  - format_score(), format_layer(), format_status(), format_priority() utilities
- Respect NO_COLOR, FORCE_COLOR, and TERM=dumb environment variables
- Add 13 unit tests covering all functionality
- Expose module in src/cli/mod.rs

Closes: meta_skill-x37n

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
